name: XP FIC De Fundos Incentivados De Investimento Em Infraestrutura Renda Fixa
summary: XP FIC De Fundos Incentivados De Investimento Em Infraestrutura Renda Fixa is a fixed-income fund focused on investing in infrastructure projects in Brazil. The fund's objective is to provide investors with returns through investments in incentivized infrastructure debt instruments. It supports the development of infrastructure projects in sectors such as energy, transportation, and sanitation.
